# E-Shopping Website Project Instructions

## Project Overview
- **Name**: radji e-shopping website
- **Tech Stack**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL
- **User Roles**: Admin, Seller, Customer
- **Key Features**: Product management, photo upload, download, comments, location management

## Progress Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file
- [ ] Scaffold the project structure
- [ ] Customize project files
- [ ] Install required extensions
- [ ] Compile/set up the project
- [ ] Create and run tasks
- [ ] Launch the project
- [ ] Ensure documentation is complete

## Project Structure
```
radji/
├── .github/
│   └── copilot-instructions.md
├── public/
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── css/
│   │   └── style.css
│   ├── js/
│   │   └── script.js
│   └── images/
├── src/
│   ├── admin/
│   ├── seller/
│   ├── customer/
│   └── includes/
├── database/
│   └── schema.sql
├── config/
│   └── config.php
└── README.md
```
